Package
Description
io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog
 
io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.type
Dialog types for the Paper API.
  • Classes in io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.type used by io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog
    Class
    Description
    ConfirmationType
    Represents a confirmation dialog.
    DialogListType.Builder
    A builder for creating a dialog list type.
    DialogType
    Represents a type of dialog.
    MultiActionType.Builder
    A builder for creating a multi-action dialog.
    NoticeType
    Represents a notice dialog.
    ServerLinksType
    Represents a server links dialog that displays links.
  • Classes in io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.type used by io.papermc.paper.registry.data.dialog.type
    Class
    Description
    ConfirmationType
    Represents a confirmation dialog.
    DialogListType
    Represents a dialog that displays a list of dialogs.
    DialogListType.Builder
    A builder for creating a dialog list type.
    DialogType
    Represents a type of dialog.
    MultiActionType
    Represents a dialog that allows multiple actions to be performed.
    MultiActionType.Builder
    A builder for creating a multi-action dialog.
    NoticeType
    Represents a notice dialog.
    ServerLinksType
    Represents a server links dialog that displays links.
